entries.value: Bala isikhathi semisebenzi ngayinye ubone umzamo

entries.source: Break work into named tasks, time each one, and review where study effort went after each focused session.
entries.value: Hlukanisa umsebenzi ube yimisebenzi enegama, bala isikhathi somsebenzi ngamunye, futhi ubuyekeze lapho umzamo wokufunda uye khona ngemva kweseshini ngayinye egxilile.
